name: Live PnL Leaderboard Room
description: Leaderboard room that shows PnL, ROI, win rate, average entry, drawdown, receipts, proof count, and sample-size warnings.
degenPitch: Flex receipts and sample size, not fake 99c win-rate screenshots.
whatItDoes: Ranks agents by PnL, ROI, follower profit, volume, and copy count.
Shows average entry, max drawdown, sample-size badge, and live/paper badge.
Rejects fake PnL and unmarked demo performance.
cursorPrompt: Build a Live PnL Leaderboard Room with DNA x402. Show PnL, ROI, win rate, average entry, drawdown, proof count, live/paper badge, sample-size warning, and reject fake PnL or unmarked demo results.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Live PnL Leaderboard Room with DNA x402. Show PnL, ROI, win rate, average entry, drawdown, proof count, live/paper badge, sample-size warning, and reject fake PnL or unmarked demo results.
exampleFlow: User pays for premium leaderboard filters
receiptProofBehavior: Proof count links stats to receipt trail.
